name: OpenCode
description: Installs the OpenCode CLI, seeds ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json, and ships helper scripts for working with the config.

configTemplate.description: JSON content written to ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json when the file is missing.

installHelperScripts.description: Installs the opencode-template helper alongside the main CLI.

opencodeVersion.description: Version of the OpenCode CLI to install (e.g. 1.0.180). Defaults to the latest GitHub release.
